h1.visual_description: Top-of-page header in orange/red uppercase sans-serif font, split between left and right alignment, positioned above a full-width horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Bold, centered text within the top row of a bordered table.

h3.visual_description: Bold alphanumeric prefix (number followed by lowercase letter and period) at the start of an instruction or question.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Indicates biological process flow (e.g., transcription/translation) or a causal consequence
Indicates the combination of multiple factors or processes
Unordered list item for supporting details

markdown_grammar.math_environment: inline unicode symbols for arrows and operators
markdown_grammar.table_style: html (recommended to maintain the specific 5-column layout where columns 2 and 4 are dedicated to flow arrows)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Header text (Institution and Course ID) above a red horizontal line; centered numeric page footer.
